chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-298 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 1378/25 2.For orders on o/objections 3.For orders on CMA 1379/25 4.For hearing of main case 14-03-2025 Mr. Tariq Mobeen, Associate of Mr. Imdad Ali Malik, Advocate for petitioners. **** Admittedly the petitioners, who are civil servants, seek reinstatement in service, which this Court has no jurisdiction to entertain the same in view of bar contained under Article 212 of the Constitution. Accordingly, instant petition along with listed application(s) stands dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
